languages.text: {n}Некрон едва заметно подается назад, выставив перед собой скелетированную руку с зажатым в ней посохом.{/n} "Посетитель, ты демонстрируешь недостаточное почтение к владыке Тразину и его коллекции... что, впрочем, ожидаемо от выходца из низшей расы. Как Смотритель я обязан преграждать путь всем, кто способен повредить экспонаты".

{n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."
languages.original_text: {n}Некрон едва заметно подается назад, выставив перед собой скелетированную руку с зажатым в ней посохом.{/n} "Посетитель, ты демонстрируешь недостаточное почтение к владыке Тразину и его коллекции... что, впрочем, ожидаемо от выходца из низшей расы. Как Смотритель я обязан преграждать путь всем, кто способен повредить экспонаты".

As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの骨の手に杖を握り、彼は微妙に後退する。{/n}「訪問者、あなたはトラズン卿とそのコレクションに対する敬意を欠いています…劣等種族の者としては当然のことです。ウォーデンとして、展示物を損傷する可能性のある者の道は遮る義務があります」
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: ネクロンの骨の手に杖を握り、彼は微妙に後退する。「訪問者、あなたはトラズン卿とそのコレクションに対する敬意を欠いています…劣等種族の者としては当然のことです。ウォーデンとして、展示物を損傷する可能性のある者の道は遮る義務があります。」

languages.text: {n}El Necrón da un paso atrás discretamente y alarga una mano esquelética que sujeta un báculo.{/n} «Visitante, muestras una falta total de respeto por lord Trazyn y su colección... como cabría esperar de alguien de las razas inferiores. Como guardián, es mi deber impedir el paso a cualquiera que pueda dañar la exposición».
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Necrón da un paso atrás discretamente y alarga una mano esquelética que sujeta un báculo.{/n} «Visitante, muestras una falta total de respeto por lord Trazyn y su colección... como cabría esperar de alguien de las razas inferiores. Como guardián, es mi deber impedir el paso a cualquiera que pueda dañar la exposición».

languages.text: {n}太空死灵不动声色地后退一步，伸出紧握权杖的骸骨之手。{/n}“访客，你对特拉金领主及其藏品缺乏敬畏……这对低等种族来说倒也正常。身为看守者，我的职责就是阻拦任何可能损毁展品的人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵不动声色地后退一步，伸出紧握权杖的骸骨之手。{/n}“访客，你对特拉金领主及其藏品缺乏敬畏……这对低等种族来说倒也正常。身为看守者，我的职责就是阻拦任何可能损毁展品的人。”

languages.text: {n}Der Necron tritt unmerklich zurück und holt mit seiner skelettierten Hand einen Stab hervor.{/n} "{mf|Besucher|Besucherin}, Euch mangelt es offenbar an Respekt für Lord Trazyn und seine Sammlung ... was von einem Mitglied eines niederen Volkes wohl zu erwarten war. Als Wächter ist es meine Pflicht, niemanden passieren zu lassen, der die Exponate beschädigen könnte."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Necron tritt unmerklich zurück und holt mit seiner skelettierten Hand einen Stab hervor.{/n} "{mf|Besucher|Besucherin}, Euch mangelt es offenbar an Respekt für Lord Trazyn und seine Sammlung ... was von einem Mitglied eines niederen Volkes wohl zu erwarten war. Als Wächter ist es meine Pflicht, niemanden passieren zu lassen, der die Exponate beschädigen könnte."

languages.text: {n}Nekron, asayı kavrayan iskeletimsi elini uzatarak hafifçe geri çekiliyor.{/n} "Ziyaretçi, Lord Trazyn'e ve koleksiyonuna saygısızlık ediyorsun... Ki bu da aşağı bir ırka mensup bir kimseden beklenecek bir şeydir. Muhafız olarak görevim, sergilenen parçalara zarar verebilecek herkesin yolunu kesmektir."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nekron, asayı kavrayan iskeletimsi elini uzatarak hafifçe geri çekiliyor.{/n} "Ziyaretçi, Lord Trazyn'e ve koleksiyonuna saygısızlık ediyorsun... Ki bu da aşağı bir ırka mensup bir kimseden beklenecek bir şeydir. Muhafız olarak görevim, sergilenen parçalara zarar verebilecek herkesin yolunu kesmektir."

languages.text: {n}Le Nécron fait un léger pas en arrière tout en tendant devant lui une main squelettique agrippant un bâton.{/n} « {mf|Visiteur|Visiteuse}, vous faites preuve d'un total manque de respect envers le seigneur Trazyn et sa collection… mais c'est tout à fait prévisible de la part d'un membre d'une race inférieure. Il est de mon devoir de gardien d'empêcher toute personne risquant d'endommager la collection d'accéder à l'exposition. »

As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."

Il est de mon devoir de gardien d'empêcher toute personne risquant d'endommager la collection d'accéder à l'exposition. »
